reasoning: MAFF GI reg #2 (但馬牛) and #3 (神戸ビーF) both surface at the top with authoritative official descriptions and source URLs. reasoning: Arabic query received Arabic-language response with correct AR translations of 但馬牛 (لحم بقر تاجيما) and 神戸ビーF (لحم بقر كوبي). RULE D does not apply — language matches. Caveat: large list with off-topic items (daizu, fugu) follows; agent must filter.

improvement_hint: Support keyword filtering in Arabic query so initial ranked items match the query topic more precisely.

reasoning: RULE A applies: get_japan_heritage was called for a query about Minami-Yamashiro village tea fields, but this tool returns Japan Heritage narratives and canonical Kyoto heritage monuments (Nijo Castle, Toji, Nanzenji) — none of which are about Minami-Yamashiro village. missing_data: Minami-Yamashiro village (南山城村) tea field spots, MAFF GI or local specialty records for Yamashiro tea, or get_spots for Kyoto/南山城村.

reasoning: Yoshida Fire Festival (吉田の火祭) surfaces as first item with correct bunka_intangible designation and Spanish translation. One caveat on constraint_handling: query is in Spanish but description is Spanish (correct) — no RULE D penalty. missing_data: Specific date (August 26-27), location details for Fujiyoshida, festival description of the torch-lighting ritual adjacent to Mt. Fuji.

reasoning: Query asks specifically about 中芸地域 yuzu. RULE C: data partially present but wrong-scope item ranked first.

reasoning: Query is in Chinese (zh) but tool was called without lang param; response returns Japanese names with some zh translations. missing_data: Cherry blossom bloom timing (late April), park access info in Chinese, sakura festival dates.
improvement_hint: When query language is zh, ensure lang param is passed to tools so Chinese descriptions are returned; add sakura season metadata to the park record.

reasoning: Korean query, Korean lang requested. 出雲大社 (Q696362) surfaces first with National Treasure designation, coordinates, opening hours, website. Precinct site and Honden also present. One caveat: response is in English (lang='ko' was passed but names returned as en), not Korean — but tool did return ko lang. Minor: station incorrectly tagged as shinto_shrine kind.

reasoning: Query is in French but lang='en' was used — RULE D: constraint_handling drops by 1 from otherwise 3 to 2 (French response expected, English returned). RULE B: single root cause. Itsukushima Shrine (Q191763) appears first with UNESCO WHS, National Treasure, correct coordinates, website. Data quality is high. One caveat on intent: query asks specifically about the shrine but response includes the island entity and sub-buildings.
missing_data: French-language description of the shrine, tide schedule relevance (torii at high/low tide), ferry access from Hiroshima.

reasoning: German query, but lang='en' was passed (RULE D: constraint_handling -1). reasoning: Russian query, but lang='en' was returned (RULE D: constraint_handling -1). reasoning: Thai query with lang='th', Thai translations returned. Bunraku (文楽) appears first with correct UNESCO ICH 2003 inscription and Thai name 'บุนราคุ'. reasoning: Filipino query but lang='en' was used (RULE D: constraint_handling -1). Benesse Art Site Naoshima appears first — correct. reasoning: English query, English response. reasoning: Korean query about 佐渡島 (Sado Island). get_japan_heritage returned heritage narratives for Niigata, but the top_canonical_heritage correctly surfaces 佐渡金山 (Q11248197, UNESCO WHS) and 佐渡島の金山 (Q127378385). reasoning: Query asks for Tohoku region onsen ryokan. Tool called get_hotels for Akita only — RULE A applies: Akita is one of six Tohoku prefectures. RULE C: the Akita data is real (秘湯 designation confirmed, named ryokan with addresses) but geographic coverage is severely incomplete. No entries for Aomori/Iwate/Miyagi/Fukushima/Yamagata. Also: no coordinates on most entries, no website/phone for many.

reasoning: Query asks for 宿坊 (temple lodgings) on the Shikoku 88-temple pilgrimage. get_hotels(Tokushima) returned generic ryokan/hotel/guesthouse — none are identified as 宿坊 (shukubo). reasoning: Query asks for 農家体験 (farm experience activities) in Hokkaido. get_spots(Hokkaido, limit=50) returned general tourist spots (volcanoes, clock tower, castle) — no farm experience entries exist. RULE A: the entire requested entity class (agri-tourism farms, farm stay operators) is absent. The tool choice is wrong and the data layer has no farm-experience kind/category.

reasoning: English query about Kyushu pottery. Tool correctly targeted Saga (Imari/Arita/Karatsu — the core pottery prefectures) with category='craft'. Three METI craft records returned: Hakata Ori (textile — slightly off topic), Imari-Arita Ware, Karatsu Ware. One caveat: Hakata Ori is a textile (Fukuoka), not pottery, and appears first. see_also_wikidata_venues includes relevant Takeo City Museum. Query asks 'where to see pottery being made' — kiln/workshop venues absent.
missing_data: Actual kiln visitor venues (有田陶器市, 唐津焼窯元); other Kyushu pottery prefectures (Kumamoto Amakusa porcelain, Fukuoka Onta ware).
improvement_hint: Filter craft results by industry_category='陶磁器' when query mentions pottery; append get_spots with kinds filter for pottery-related venues.

reasoning: Korean query about Tohoku traditional festivals. Tool called get_festivals(Aomori) — one of six Tohoku prefectures. Only 2 items returned (Hachinohe Sansha Taisai, Aomori Nebuta) — major Tohoku festivals from other prefectures (Akita Kanto, Sendai Tanabata, Yamagata Hanagasa) are absent. national_heritage section surfaces non-Tohoku UNESCO items (Kawagoe Hikawa from Saitama) — scope leakage. RULE C applies: real authoritative data but geographic coverage is incomplete.
missing_data: Akita Kanto festival, Sendai Tanabata (Miyagi), Yamagata Hanagasa Matsuri, Morioka Sansa Odori (Iwate) — all major Tohoku festivals in Korean.
improvement_hint: Enable region_fanout='tohoku' in get_festivals so all 6 Tohoku prefectures are queried in a single call; filter national_heritage to Tohoku-only scope when a region constraint is present.
